summary: Admin login verification completed successfully. All authentication flows tested and working correctly - both username and email login methods, session persistence, logout, and protected API access.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin login is fully functional. Both username 'admin' and email 'antlersportsnetwork@gmail.com' work with password 'NoahTheJew1997'. Session tokens are stored in localStorage and sent with Authorization header for protected API calls.

login_with_username.description: Login with username 'admin' and password 'NoahTheJew1997' works correctly. User is redirected to sport selection page.

login_with_email.description: Login with email 'antlersportsnetwork@gmail.com' and password 'NoahTheJew1997' works correctly. User is redirected to sport selection page.

session_persistence.description: After login, session token is stored in localStorage. User name 'ADMIN' is displayed in header. Protected API endpoints are accessible.

logout_functionality.description: Clicking logout clears session token from localStorage and redirects to login page. Session is invalidated on backend.

wrong_password_error.description: Login with wrong password returns 401 error. User stays on login page. Toast error message is displayed.

session_token_api_calls.description: Session token is correctly sent with Authorization header for protected API calls (/api/auth/me, /api/teams, /api/admin/check).

test_flow: - Login page loads correctly with all form elements
- Login with username 'admin' navigates to sport selection
- Login with email navigates to sport selection
- Wrong password keeps user on login page
- Session token sent with subsequent API requests
